message:
chore(beads): ignore local history and bv lock files

Add .br_history/ and .bv.lock to .beads/.gitignore to prevent tracking
ephemeral files created by the beads_rust (br) CLI and bv (beads viewer)
tools.

- .br_history/: Local command history maintained by br CLI for user
  convenience. This directory contains session-specific data that should
  remain local and not be shared across the repository.

- .bv.lock: Lock file created by bv when the interactive TUI is active.
  This prevents multiple bv instances from running simultaneously and
  should be treated as a runtime artifact similar to PID files.

Both patterns represent runtime/user-specific state that have no value in
version control and would create noise if committed. This aligns with the
existing .gitignore philosophy of excluding temporary build artifacts,
editor files, and other ephemeral state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,3 +42,9 @@ sync_base.jsonl
 # contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.
 # The JSONL files (issues.jsonl, interactions.jsonl) and config files
 # are tracked by git by default since no pattern above ignores them.
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
